included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Nelliyampathi & Orange Orchards
itinerary.description: Arrive in Nelliyampathi. Explore the untouched orange orchards, cloud-kissed tea estates, and witness the deep valley from Seetharkundu viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Drive to Munnar & Tea Gardens Walk
itinerary.description: Drive to Munnar. Spend the afternoon walking through the lush green tea gardens, visit Mattupetty Dam, and enjoy the sunset at Echo Point.

itinerary.title: Fort Kochi Heritage Tour to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Travel to Cochin. See the historic Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, and Jew Town. In the evening, travel to the backwaters of Alleppey.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat Backwater Cruise & Departure
itinerary.description: Board a luxury houseboat. Relax as you glide along the quiet backwater lakes, enjoying traditional Kerala meals on board before your departure.

title: Nelliyampathi, Munnar & Alleppey: Eco-Hills & Houseboat
description: Immerse yourself in Kerala's finest nature reserves and backwaters. Visit the untouched orange orchards and misty valleys of Nelliyampathi, tour Munnar's tea gardens, explore historic Fort Kochi, and cruise Alleppey's backwaters on a private houseboat.
highlights: Explore Nelliyampathi's orange farms and Seetharkundu viewpoint
Walk in the tea plantations and spice farms of Munnar
See Fort Kochi's Chinese Fishing Nets and historical churches
Enjoy an overnight stay on a traditional luxury Alleppey houseboat
